Macros

#define bool _Bool
#define true 1
#define false 0

Detailed Description

TODO: Add Doxygen documentation for stdbool workaround header.

ClangTool compatibility shim for stdbool.h. Provides workaround for LibTooling __has_include_next bug.

Needs documentation for: Purpose, bug details, compatibility scope

Definition in file stdbool.h.
